title: Global System Health
description: Consolidated view of critical T2 Capabilities: Combat, Economy, Rendering, and World Generation.

widgets.name: Rendering Latency (P99)
widgets.query: SELECT quantileAppox(0.99)(durationNano) / 1000000 AS p99_latency_ms FROM signoz_index.traces WHERE serviceName = 'SpaceGame' AND name = 'render.update' GROUP BY time

widgets.name: Combat Latency (P99)
widgets.query: SELECT quantileAppox(0.99)(durationNano) / 1000000 AS p99_latency_ms FROM signoz_index.traces WHERE serviceName = 'SpaceGame' AND name = 'combat.weapon.fire' GROUP BY time

widgets.name: Economy Error Rate
widgets.query: SELECT countIf(statusCode = 2) * 100.0 / count(*) AS error_rate_percent FROM signoz_index.traces WHERE serviceName = 'SpaceGame' AND name = 'economy.buy_ship' GROUP BY time

widgets.name: NPC Mission Throughput
widgets.query: SELECT count(*) AS outcomes_per_min FROM signoz_index.traces WHERE serviceName = 'SpaceGame' AND name = 'game.npc.mission.outcome' AND attributes['mission.success'] = true GROUP BY time

widgets.name: World Gen Performance (P95)
widgets.query: SELECT quantileAppox(0.95)(durationNano) / 1000000 AS p95_load_time_ms FROM signoz_index.traces WHERE serviceName = 'SpaceGame' AND name = 'game.core.world.load' GROUP BY time

widgets.name: Universe Density
widgets.query: SELECT countIf(name = 'game.world.gen.celestial_body') AS total_bodies FROM signoz_index.traces WHERE serviceName = 'SpaceGame' GROUP BY time

widgets.name: Vessel Survival (Deaths)
widgets.description: Total deaths due to starvation/power failure
widgets.query: SELECT sumIf(attributes['vessel.deaths']) AS total_deaths FROM signoz_index.traces WHERE serviceName = 'SpaceGame' AND name IN ('engine.resource.starvation', 'engine.resource.power_failure_death') GROUP BY time
